@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor("loadUser async/await")
C: same_order ∧ one_next(err) ∧ async_await
P: promisify(db.findUser) → await(audit.log) → await(cache.set) → "ok(next(null,user))"
V: "!id->missing_id" ∧ "db err->next(err)" ∧ "!user->not_found"
R: ! "cb->promise reject map" ∧ ! "this binding on methods"
A: "async loadUser(id,next){if(!id)r"

[AUDIT]
Refactor "loadUser async/await" to async/await with minimal behavior change, preserve same validation order, single next(err) path, and verify the single next(err) path.
